name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger.
2. Remove from heat and add 1 tablespoon of the taco seasoning mix, stirring until combined.
3. Allow to cool completely.
4. In a large bowl, layer lettuce, hamburger, onion, tomatoes, beans, and grated cheese.
5. When ready to serve, pour the sauce over the salad and toss well with the chips (Doritos).
6. Serve immediately.
